query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT availableCash FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1) as cash,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open') as deployed,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open') as openCount,
  (SELECT SUM(realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1) as totalRealizedPnl,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1) as tradeCount;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute 
SELECT 
  (SELECT availableCash FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1) as cash,
  (SELECT SUM(allocatedCapital) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open') as deployed,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open') as openCount,
  (SELECT SUM(realizedPnl) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1) as totalRealizedPnl,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1) as tradeCount;
